name: Smoked Salmon Chowder
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chablis or other white wine
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 4-quart pot over medium heat, melt margarine and bacon fat.
2. Add onion, celery, potatoes, garlic, thyme, tarragon, and dill weed. Cook until onions are translucent.
3. Reduce heat and add flour and paprika. Blend well.
4. Stir in fish stock. Add smoked salmon, bay leaf, lemon juice, Worcestershire sauce, Tabasco sauce, pepper, salt, and wine.
5. Bring to a boil. Reduce heat and simmer for 20 minutes.
6. Remove from heat. Stir in half-and-half and parsley.
7. Serve.
Note: Fish stock can be made following directions in many basic cookbooks or purchased frozen from specialty food stores or as dried soup packets at the supermarket.
